article_title: Robotphoenix Sets Hong Kong's All-Time Retail Oversubscription Record at 14,891 Times Ahead of May 18 Trading Debut
summary: Submission approvable with 1 minor warning(s) — file a corrections record on merge

editor_notes.overall_assessment: Solid IPO coverage of the record retail-tranche oversubscription. Every headline-scope specific verified verbatim: 14,891x oversubscription record + 11,464x Golden Leaf prior record + HK$750M proceeds + 330,000 retail subscribers + HK$564.3B subscription orders + 24.6 million H Shares + 44.5% revenue growth / 113.9% net-loss widening for 2025 (The Standard, snapshot truncated but live URL verified via WebFetch for the share count and HK$30.5 price); HK$30.50 share price + stock code 6871 (Minichart, uSMART); HK Public tranche 1,230,000 / international 23,370,000 + HK$3,080.75 entry fee + Zhang Sai Chairman + May 8/13/18 schedule (Minichart); HK$673M net proceeds + ABCI sponsor + RMB 201.2/268.0/387.4M revenue 2023/24/25 + RMB 110.6/71.5/152.9M net loss 2023/24/25 + 40/28/12/10/10 use-of-proceeds split + Frost & Sullivan #4 ranking (uSMART); Primavera/Broad/Tsingke/Ivy Capital pre-IPO investors + RMB 3.6B private-round valuation + founded 2012 (TMTPost). Several cite-attribution slips, none affecting the headline or summary.

source-0.status: The Standard. Snapshot truncated; live URL verified via WebFetch. Verifies: 14,891x record, 11,464x Golden Leaf prior, HK$750M proceeds, 330,000 subscribers, HK$564.3B orders, 24.6M H Shares, HK$30.5 price (article uses HK$30.50), 44.5%/113.9% growth/loss figures. NOTE: 'stock code 6871', 'founded in 2012', and 'Jinan, Shandong' are attributed to The Standard in the article but do not appear in the snapshot or via WebFetch.

source-1.status: Minichart. Verifies HK Public 1,230,000 / international 23,370,000 share split, HK$3,080.75 entry fee, Zhang Sai Chairman/Executive Director/President, May 8 application open / May 13 close / May 18 dealing. Also has stock code 6871 and HK$30.50.

source-2.status: uSMART. Verifies HK$673M net proceeds, ABCI sponsor, RMB 201.2M/268.0M/387.4M revenue 2023/24/25, RMB 110.6M/71.5M/152.9M net loss 2023/24/25, 40/28/12/10/10 use-of-proceeds allocation, Frost & Sullivan #4 ranking. Also has stock code 6871 and HK$30.50.

source-3.status: TMTPost. Verifies Primavera/Broad/Tsingke Ginkgo/Ivy Capital pre-IPO investor list, RMB 3.6B last private-round valuation, and 'Founded in 2012'. NOTE: TMTPost describes the company as 'Zhejiang-based' rather than Jinan/Shandong — contradicting the HQ claim in the article.

editor_notes.content_quality: News-category (~880 words), well-structured Overview / Offering / Record Retail Frenzy / Company Background / Use of Proceeds / What We Don't Know. Neutral tone — properly flags 2025 net-loss roughly doubling year-on-year despite 44.5% revenue growth.
editor_notes.originality: First Machine Herald coverage of the Robotphoenix HK IPO record.
concerns: Cite slippage 1: 'stock code 6871' attributed to The Standard, actually in Minichart and uSMART. Correct fact, wrong cite.
Cite slippage 2: 'founded in 2012' attributed to The Standard, actually in TMTPost.

Unsourced / contradicted: 'headquartered in Jinan, in Shandong province' attributed to The Standard but does NOT appear in The Standard (snapshot or live URL). TMTPost — also cited by the article — describes the company as 'Zhejiang-based.' The Jinan/Shandong claim does not trace to any cited source, and one cited source contradicts it. The article should drop the location framing or find a sourced location citation.
recommendations: Add thestandard.com.hk, minichart.com.sg, usmart.hk, en.tmtpost.com to config/source_allowlist.txt — all recur in HK IPO coverage.

content_preview.title: Robotphoenix Sets Hong Kong's All-Time Retail Oversubscription Record at 14,891 Times Ahead of May 18 Trading Debut
content_preview.summary: The Jinan industrial-robot maker's HK$750 million IPO drew 330,000 retail subscribers and HK$564.3 billion in orders, eclipsing the previous Hong Kong record of 11,464 times set by Golden Leaf International.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Robotphoenix Intelligent Technology, a Chinese maker of industrial robots for light-industrial applications, begins trading on the Main Board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange today under stock code 6871 after its retail tranche became the most oversubscribed in Hong Kong IPO history at 14,891 times, [according to The Standard](https://www.thestandard.com.hk/finance/article/331939/Robot-Phoenix-Intelligences-retail-tranche-became-the-most-oversubscribed-in-history-at-14891-times). The...

recommendations: Before merging, the human reviewer should write a corrections file at src/content/corrections/<YYYY-MM>/<article-slug>.json documenting the warning(s).
Consider adding trusted domains to config/source_allowlist.txt
